.github/workflows/maven.yml.general_idea: Update the GitHub Actions workflow to use JDK 21 instead of JDK 17 for the build environment.

pom.xml.general_idea: Set the Maven compiler release target to Java 21 to ensure bytecode compatibility with the new JDK version.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project would compile against the default JDK version (likely 17 or lower), failing to utilize Java 21 features or potentially causing runtime issues if Java 21-specific APIs are used.

raspberrypi-boot-bmp085/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to target JDK 21.
raspberrypi-boot-bmp085/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile and run against JDK 17, failing to utilize JDK 21 features or enforce JDK 21 compatibility.

raspberrypi-boot-bmp085/src/main/java/de.general_idea: Replace Math.random() with ThreadLocalRandom for better concurrency performance.

raspberrypi-boot-gdata/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Maven project property to target Java 21 instead of Java 17.

raspberrypi-boot-gdata/src/main/java/de/.general_idea: Replace deprecated URL constructor with URI.create().toURL() to comply with stricter security checks in newer JDKs.
raspberrypi-boot-gdata/src/main/java/de/.why_exists: java.net.URL(String) constructor throws MalformedURLException or is discouraged/removed in favor of URI-based construction in modern Java versions to prevent security vulnerabilities.

raspberrypi-boot-gdata/src/main/java/de/.general_idea: Replace List.get(0) with List.getFirst() to use the new default method added in Java 21.

raspberrypi-boot-pushover/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Maven project property to target Java 21 instead of Java 17.

raspberrypi-boot-server/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property in the Maven POM to target Java 21.
